meta_title: For Freelancers: SaaS starter kit to Solve no SaaS knowledge (Beginner Idea List)
meta_description: Learn how to SaaS starter kit and overcome no SaaS knowledge. A Beginner-level Idea List using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: SaaS Starter Kit to Solve No SaaS Knowledge
content.seo_description: Bridge the gap between design and deployment. Master SaaS development for clients using Antigravity and Claude Code in this expert-led, step-by-step guide.
content.answer_block: Overcome the lack of SaaS expertise by leveraging a modular SaaS starter kit. By combining Antigravity for automated architecture and Claude Code for iterative development, you can ship production-ready applications in days, not months. This approach abstracts complex backend boilerplate, allowing you to focus purely on high-margin client features.
content.intro:
The blank editor is a freelancer's graveyard. You have the design skills and the client demand, but the chasm between a UI prototype and a production-ready SaaS architecture feels insurmountable. You’re watching revenue slip away because you’re trapped in the 'no SaaS knowledge' loop, spending weeks debugging database schemas instead of shipping value.

But the game has changed. By treating SaaS development as an assembly process rather than a ground-up coding exercise, you reclaim your agency. Using modern AI-native tools, you can now bypass the manual grind, deploying robust, scalable foundations in hours. It’s time to stop building websites and start architecting businesses.

steps.title: Define the SaaS Blueprint
steps.description: Establish the core entity relationships and authentication requirements for your client's project using a structured prompt.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a clean, modular Next.js 14 architecture with Supabase integration, including user auth, profile management, and a Stripe subscription boilerplate.

steps.title: Automate Database Migrations
steps.description: Use AI to define your schema definitions so you never have to write SQL manually.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create Drizzle ORM schema files for a multi-tenant SaaS application, including tables for organizations, users, and subscription plans.

steps.title: Implement Role-Based Access Control
steps.description: Secure your application by defining clear authorization boundaries from the start.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write middleware for Next.js that enforces role-based access control (RBAC) protecting /dashboard and /admin routes based on user roles in the database.
steps.claude_code_command: claude commit 'Implement RBAC middleware for protected routes'

steps.title: Integrate Payment Infrastructure
steps.description: Connect Stripe webhooks to your application to handle subscription events seamlessly.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a Stripe webhook handler that updates user subscription status in Supabase upon successful payment events.

steps.title: Deploy to Production
steps.description: Configure the CI/CD pipeline to ensure your code is always production-ready.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a GitHub Actions workflow that runs linting, type-checking, and deploys the application to Vercel upon merge to the main branch.

pro_tips: Always wrap your database calls in Zod schemas to guarantee type safety before data hits your frontend.
Use 'feature flags' in your code even for small projects to allow for rapid, safe experimentation with client requests.
Never hardcode environment variables; use a `.env.example` file to ensure your team or clients can replicate your environment instantly.
Leverage Claude Code's 'review' feature to audit your generated boilerplate against industry-standard security vulnerabilities.
Focus on 'Time to First Dollar'—prioritize building the payment flow before the decorative UI elements.
content.next_steps: After completing your first deploy, document your architecture in a README file to create a repeatable 'Productized Service' you can sell to future clients.
content.conversion_block: Stop letting technical barriers dictate your earnings. Master these tools today to transform from a freelancer into a full-stack SaaS architect. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
